name: Fitcountable
subtitle: AI fitness and accountability
description:
Fitcountable is an AI-native workout and nutrition tracker built for people who want consistency, accountability, and faster logging. Type or speak what happened, then review editable workout, meal, macro, and accountability drafts before saving.

Track strength sessions, meals, calories, protein, carbs, and fat. Use accountability mode to share consistency with selected friends and keep proof private by default. Fitcountable Premium unlocks higher AI command limits, advanced plans, deeper history, and enhanced accountability nudges.

Nutrition estimates are informational and should be reviewed before saving. Fitcountable is not medical advice.

Terms of Use: https://fitcountable.vercel.app/terms
Apple Standard EULA: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
Privacy Policy: https://fitcountable.vercel.app/privacy
promotionalText: Log workouts and meals by speaking naturally, then review structured AI drafts before saving.
releaseNotes: Initial release with onboarding, AI command logging, workout and meal tracking, accountability proof, and premium access.
appReviewNotes: Fitcountable is submitted as an iPhone-only app. The binary targets UIDeviceFamily iPhone only (TARGETED_DEVICE_FAMILY=1); no iPad, Apple Watch, or other platform version is included in this submission. Please review on iPhone, or in iPhone compatibility mode if using another Apple review device. Please use Sign in with Apple during onboarding; no developer Apple Account password is required. AI commands are reviewed by the user before saving. Nutrition and macro values are informational estimates. The app uses microphone and speech recognition only when the user taps the voice command control. Premium uses Apple In-App Purchase; reviewers can test purchases using Apple's review/sandbox purchase flow.
